# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - HEAD
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - User-Agent
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-Tenant-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Correlation-Id
      credentials: true
      preflight_continue: false
      max_age: 3600

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      second: 10
      minute: 300
      hour: 5000

services:
  - name: api-service
    host: api-upstream.internal
    port: 443
    protocol: https
    path: /
    retries: 3
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000

    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - "https://app.example.com"
            - "https://admin.example.com"
            - "https://partner.example.com"
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - X-Tenant-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          preflight_continue: false
          max_age: 3600

      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_in_body: false
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          second: 20
          minute: 600
          hour: 10000

    routes:
      - name: api-public
        paths:
          - /v1/public
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - "https://app.example.com"
                - "https://admin.example.com"
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              preflight_continue: false
              max_age: 3600

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: ip
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              second: 5
              minute: 120
              hour: 2000

      - name: api-secure
        paths:
          - /v1/secure
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
              key_in_header: true
              key_in_query: false
              key_in_body: false
              hide_credentials: true
              run_on_preflight: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
              second: 10
              minute: 200
              hour: 3000

consumers:
  - username: webapp
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_WEBAPP_API_KEY"

  - username: adminapp
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_ADMINAPP_API_KEY"
